title: Business Introduction
description: Submit a structured request for the club team to review and coordinate.
formDescription: Recommend a business opportunity to a verified partner from the directory. The club team reviews and coordinates each request.
clientContactHelp: Phone, email, or messenger for the club team to coordinate.
messageHelp: Describe the business opportunity, what you recommend, and any relevant context for the partner.
success: Request submitted. The club team will review it.
formError: The request could not be submitted. Please review the form.
emptyBusinessesDescription: The request form will become available when the directory has published businesses.
recentDescription: A compact view of your latest Business Introduction requests.
recentEmptyDescription: Submitted requests will appear here after the form is sent.
